problem_statement: Nested Mind exposes a GitHub App installation-token exchange boundary that stores only token fingerprints, expiry, permissions, response hashes, and request bindings. Mullu Control Plane has a Foundation Mode token-format guard and a GitHub check-run write receipt boundary, but no local receipt planner that can bind GitHub App token exchange evidence without loading private keys, minting JWTs, calling GitHub, or storing raw installation tokens.
success_criteria: GitHub App token-exchange plans build deterministic installation-token endpoint and request payload evidence for repository, app id, installation id, requested permissions, and bounded TTL
Plan-only and dry-run modes perform no GitHub network call, load no private key, create no JWT, store no raw token, and cannot claim token response evidence

Exchange-approved mode requires operator approval, external execution receipt ref, 2xx response status, token fingerprint, token expiry, and response payload hash before a token exchange claim is admitted
Raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material in metadata or payload fields blocks receipt admission with explicit causal reasons
The token-exchange receipt is schema-backed, indexed in the governance protocol manifest, and included in proof coverage matrix witnesses
No GitHub App token minting, private-key loading, JWT creation, GitHub API mutation, branch protection mutation, deployment, or production readiness claim is introduced
non_goals: no live GitHub App token minting
constraints: all exchange-approved claims must bind external execution evidence instead of performing the token exchange in the planner
plan-only and dry-run modes must remain free of external effects and response evidence
private-key fingerprints, token fingerprints, and response payload hashes must be sha256-prefixed hex digests
token TTL must stay within 1..3600 seconds
requested permissions must be explicit and bounded to read or write
raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material must fail closed
receipt generation must be deterministic and schema-valid
evidence_required: focused GitHub App token-exchange test receipt
standalone SDLC requirement and design validation receipt
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
